title: leucanthemum vulgare subsp. catalaunicum
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. catalaunicum, also known as the Catalonian ox-eye daisy, is a subspecies of the daisy family characterized by its daisy-like flowers with white petals and yellow centers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. catalaunicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. catalaunicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
